name: ch23-opener-tool-belt
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A friendly robot wearing a utility belt full of colorful tools (wrench, magnifying glass, calculator, paintbrush, telescope). The robot is standing at a workbench, carefully selecting the right tool for a task while a glowing JSON schema floats above each tool like a label. The scene conveys the idea that an AI agent chooses structured tools rather than improvising. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch23-function-calling-loop
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A circular conveyor belt connecting three stations. At the first station, a friendly robot hands a small package labeled with a question mark to a conveyor. At the second station, a mechanical arm picks up the package and runs it through a tool machine that produces a glowing result orb. At the third station, the robot receives the orb, examines it, and either sends it back around the loop or gives a thumbs up. The circular flow shows the iterative function calling loop between model, tool, and response. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch23-mcp-usb-analogy
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A giant USB hub in the center, with multiple colorful cables extending outward. Each cable connects to a different cartoon device: a database shaped like a filing cabinet, a web browser shaped like a window, a calendar shaped like a clock, and a code editor shaped like a notebook. A small friendly robot plugs into the hub and instantly gains access to all the devices. The visual metaphor shows MCP as a universal connector that gives agents standardized access to many tools. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch23-a2a-agents-talking
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: Three friendly robots of different colors sitting around a round table, each holding a business card that shows their specialty (one has a magnifying glass icon, one has a checkmark shield, one has a gear). They are passing structured message envelopes to each other across the table. Above the table floats a shared task board showing the progress of a collaborative workflow. The scene illustrates the A2A protocol where independent agents discover each other and coordinate on tasks. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch23-bad-tool-design
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A humorous scene showing a robot trying to use a comically oversized Swiss Army knife where every blade is tangled together. The robot looks confused and frustrated as it tries to extract just one tool but keeps pulling out five others. Nearby, a second smarter robot happily uses a well-organized toolbox with clearly separated, labeled compartments, each holding one clean tool. The contrast illustrates why good tool design with clear boundaries and validation matters. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch23-agentic-rag-librarian
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot librarian standing in a vast library, actively planning its search strategy. Instead of just grabbing the nearest book, it consults a map of the library, marks several shelves to visit, and has a notepad where it evaluates which sources were useful. Some books glow green (relevant) and others are grayed out (rejected). A simple RAG robot nearby just grabs one random book and reads it aloud. The contrast shows how agentic RAG plans, evaluates, and iterates compared to simple retrieval. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.
